title: Device Home Screen - Zoom out the application to verify that it remains the same
scenario: Verify that zooming out via app switcher and returning to full screen keeps the app on the same screen (home screen or settings) as before.
steps: Open app with connected device, then open app switcher — preview should show the home screen unchanged.
Tap app for full screen — app is properly selected and remains on the same screen.
Open Device Settings via '...' button, then open app switcher — preview should show the settings screen unchanged.
Tap app for full screen — app is properly selected and remains on the same screen.
expected: Zooming out the application (via app switcher) and returning to full screen keeps the app on the same screen as before.
